items.rationale: His most recent and strongest theme: he frames AI and blockchain as co-dependent technology movements, and his March 2025 CSX 04 cohort is dominated by verifiable AI, confidential compute, and AI-agent/DeFi-data startups.

citations.quote: This time is no different: AI needs blockchain-enabled computing.
Ambient: building a blockchain that integrates large language models for verifiable, censorship-resistant AI capabilities
When transformative technologies like crypto and AI come along, we should first try to understand their essence

items.rationale: Repeatedly singles out Sreeram Kannan's EigenLayer/EigenCloud as a category-defining advance in alternative data availability and verifiable compute; sustained from early 2024 into March 2025.
items.age_note: First flagged 2024-02-22; reaffirmed via warm 2025-03-25 mention, so current not stale.

citations.quote: What @eigencloud and @sreeramkannan are building and envisioning is truly next level. Beyond excited to have the opportunity to work together.
Listening to @sreeramkannan and @alive_ discuss the evolution of their relationship and @eigencloud is a special treat.

items.rationale: Twice enthused about Gensyn's vision of permissionless substrate for machine training; fits his thesis that AI compute belongs onchain.

citations.quote: Very exciting to see the scale and scope of @benfielding, @harrygrieve and the entire @gensynai team's work and vision come into public view.
The substrate on which machines train and exist has to be permissionless.

items.rationale: Long-running excitement about ZK as a foundational primitive; repeatedly highlighted in cohort programming and as 'a big, big deal.'

citations.quote: Translation for folks who aren't fluent in the world of ZK- this is a big, big deal.
Energized by the rate at which key crypto primitives are snapping into focus!

items.rationale: Endorsed the thesis that stablecoins reset payments market structure as the cheapest way to move dollars; a March 2025 cohort company (zar) targets cash-to-stablecoin in emerging markets.

citations.quote: Stablecoins are the cheapest way to send a dollar. Stablecoins can reset the market structure in the payments industry
@zardotapp: building a decentralized cash-to-stablecoin platform for emerging markets

items.rationale: Cited the 'drumbeat' of L2 throughput/fee progress and embedded-wallet onboarding (Privy, Dynamic) as platform accelerants for developer experimentation, analogous to prior web1/web2 stack moments.
items.age_note: Most detailed articulation is 2024-02-09; not restated with equal specificity since, so treated as persisted.

citations.quote: Continued drumbeat of L2 progress in terms of reducing Ethereum transaction fees and increasing throughput
Reduced new user onboarding friction through embedded wallets- @privy, @dynamic_xyz

items.rationale: Pointed to Farcaster Frames as 'super simple and fun' app development and praised onchain composability turning primitives into games/art; sees consumer surface as a growth frontier.
items.age_note: Peak enthusiasm in 2024; lighter touch by early 2025 as focus shifted toward AI.

citations.quote: Super simple (and fun!) app development- @farcaster_xyz Frames
@dotdotfan showcases the power of onchain composability, turning colors into building blocks for creating onchain art and casual games

items.rationale: Earlier treated the regulatory landscape as a hazard founders must carefully navigate; his most recent stance is optimism that post-election clearer rules will help legitimate projects rather than hinder them.
items.age_note: Reversal: 2024 framing emphasized navigating risk; by 2024-11-10 he shifted to optimism on clearer rules. Current stance is net-positive, so concern is muted.

citations.quote: We're optimistic that with clearer rules, it will make it easier to identify and shut down bad actors and allow well-meaning projects to take off.
they answered Founders' burning questions in terms of how to best navigate the current environment.

risk_regime.rationale: Consistently and increasingly bullish on building in crypto: declares 2025 a 'transformative year,' frames AI+crypto as a once-in-a-generation platform convergence, expanded the accelerator to two cohorts/year plus an SF program, and reads the post-election policy shift as a tailwind. No bearish or defensive market signals appear in the corpus.

notes: Rosenthal is an accelerator lead/operator, not a token trader, so the bulk of his corpus is CSX promotion and founder craft advice (PMF, scaling, fundraising, conferences) rather than market calls. He never makes token-level buy/sell views, so tokens_excited/concerned are empty by design rather than omission — his signal is at the sector/infrastructure layer. Sector views are inferred from (a) explicit enthusiasm posts and (b) the composition of the startups he selects, with CSX 04 (2025-03-31) being the most recent and heavily AI-weighted dataset, which is why AI×crypto convergence ranks highest. He has near-zero expressed market concern; the regulatory item is included for completeness but his current stance is net-optimistic. Several 2024 infra themes (L2s, embedded wallets, onchain social) are persisted rather than freshly restated as his emphasis migrated toward verifiable AI and confidential compute by early 2025.
